chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-639 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA No.2945/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 25.09.2025 Mr. Qadeer Ahmed Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate general..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The SHO of P.S Pano Aqil/ Respondent No.7 has submitted his statement and report on behalf of SSP Sukkur/ Respondent No.6, same are taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. The counsel for the petitioners, under instructions does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
